Nurul Quran

نُورُ الْقُرْآنِ

Your complete Islamic companion — Quran with audio, prayer times, Qibla direction, and more. Free forever. Works offline.

📖 Read Quran🕌 Prayer Times

بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ

In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

Everything You Need

Complete Islamic tools in one free app

📖

Quran Reader

All 114 surahs with Arabic text, English & Urdu translations, and audio recitation

🔍

Smart Search

Search by surah name, ayah number, or keyword across the entire Quran

🕌

Prayer Times

Accurate prayer times for your location using Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha

🧭

Qibla Direction

Find the exact direction of the Kaaba from anywhere in the world

📅

Hijri Calendar

View today's Islamic date and convert between Hijri and Gregorian calendars

📡

Works Offline

Install as an app on your phone — full Quran works without internet after first load

📲 Add to Home Screen (iOS)

1

Tap the Share button at the bottom of Safari

2

Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"

3

Tap Add — it works like a native app!
